errors.description: Signed auditor bundle envelope or referenced auditor bundle is missing or malformed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny signed auditor bundle verification until envelope evidence is present

errors.description: Signed auditor bundle hash, referenced auditor bundle hash, or canonical envelope hash does not match.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny signed auditor bundle verification until hash continuity is canonical

errors.description: Signed auditor bundle Ed25519 signature is missing, malformed, or invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny signed auditor bundle verification until signature authenticity is proven

errors.description: Signed auditor bundle signer is not present in the trusted signer policy or is revoked/expired.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny signed auditor bundle verification until signer trust is established

errors.description: Signed auditor bundle envelope identifier was already observed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny signed auditor bundle verification until replay risk is resolved

errors.description: Signed auditor bundle verification scope or signing timestamp is missing or malformed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny signed auditor bundle verification until scope and timestamp are deterministic

errors.description: Signed auditor bundle diagnostics contain sensitive or unredacted material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny signed auditor bundle verification until diagnostics are redacted
